title: Ethan Mollick重申不从AI实验室拿钱
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Ethan Mollick

Among all the big hires the labs are making recently recently, and since people occasionally ask, it may be worth reiterating that I do not take money from any of the AI labs. I also don't take any corporate sponsorship money for anything I write, whether here or substack, etc.

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 在各大实验室近期大规模招聘的背景下，且由于偶尔有人问起，或许值得重申：我不从任何AI实验室拿钱。我也不为任何我写的内容接受企业赞助，无论是在这里还是Substack等平台。

key_excerpts.text: 在各大实验室近期大规模招聘的背景下，且由于偶尔有人问起，或许值得重申：我不从任何AI实验室拿钱。我也不为任何我写的内容接受企业赞助，无论是在这里还是Substack等平台。

I also don't take any corporate sponsorship money for anything I write, whether here or substack, etc.
